{\n    61→\tresp, err := s.evaluator.Evaluate(ctx, flag, r)\n    62→\tif err != nil {\n    63→\t\treturn nil, err\n    64→\t}\n    65→\n    66→\tvar reason rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason\n    67→\n    68→\tswitch resp.Reason {\n    69→\tcase flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON:\n    70→\t\treason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n    71→\tcase (*rpcevaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse, error) {\n   132→\trollouts, err := s.store.GetEvaluationRollouts(ctx, storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, flag.Key, storage.WithReference(r.Reference)))\n   133→\tif err != nil {\n   134→\t\treturn nil, err\n   135→\t}\n   136→\n   137→\tvar (\n   138→\t\tresp = &rpcevaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse{\n   139→\t\t\tRequestId: r.RequestId,\n   140→\t\t}\n   141→\t\tlastRank int32\n   142→\t)\n   143→\n   144→\tvar (\n   145→\t\tstartTime     = time.Now().UTC()\n   146→\t\tnamespaceAttr = metrics.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey)\n   147→\t\tflagAttr      = metrics.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey)\n   148→\t)\n   149→\n   150→\tmetrics.EvaluationsTotal.Add(ctx, 1, metric.WithAttributeSet(attribute.NewSet(namespaceAttr, flagAttr)))\n   151→\n   152→\tdefer func() {\n   153→\t\tif err == nil {\n   154→\t\t\tmetrics.EvaluationResultsTotal.Add(ctx, 1,\n   155→\t\t\t\tmetric.WithAttributeSet(\n   156→\t\t\t\t\tattribute.NewSet(\n   157→\t\t\t\t\t\tnamespaceAttr,\n   158→\t\t\t\t\t\tflagAttr,\n   159→\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeValue.Bool(resp.Enabled),\n   160→\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),\n   161→\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeType.String(\"boolean\"),\n   162→\t\t\t\t\t),\n   163→\t\t\t\t),\n   164→\t\t\t)\n   165→\t\t} else {\n   166→\t\t\tmetrics.EvaluationErrorsTotal.Add(ctx, 1, metric.WithAttributeSet(attribute.NewSet(namespaceAttr, flagAttr)))\n   167→\t\t}\n   168→\n   169→\t\tmetrics.EvaluationLatency.Record(\n   170→\t\t\tctx,\n   171→\t\t\tfloat64(time.Since(startTime).Nanoseconds())/1e6,\n   172→\t\t\tmetric.WithAttributeSet(\n   173→\t\t\t\tattribute.NewSet(\n   174→\t\t\t\t\tnamespaceAttr,\n   175→\t\t\t\t\tflagAttr,\n   176→\t\t\t\t),\n   177→\t\t\t),\n   178→\t\t)\n   179→\t}()\n   180→\n   181→\tfor _, rollout := range rollouts {\n   182→\t\tif rollout.Rank < lastRank {\n   183→\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"rollout rank: %d detected out of order\", rollout.Rank)\n   184→\t\t}\n   185→\n   186→\t\tlastRank = rollout.Rank\n   187→\n matchConstraints is a utility function that will return if all or any constraints have matched for a segment depending\n// on the match type.\nfunc (e *Evaluator) matchConstraints(evalCtx map[string]string, constraints []storage.EvaluationConstraint, segmentMatchType flipt.MatchType, entityId string) (bool, string, error) {\n\tconstraintMatches := 0\n\n\tvar reason string\n\n\tfor _, c := range constraints {\n\t\tv := evalCtx[c.Property]\n\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\tmatch bool\n\t\t\terr   error\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tswitch c.Type {\n\t\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\t\tmatch = matchesString(c, v)\n\t\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_NUMBER_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\t\tmatch, err = matchesNumber(c, v)\n\t\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_BOOLEAN_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\t\tmatch, err = matchesBool(c, v)\n\t\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_DATETIME_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\t\tmatch, err = matchesDateTime(c, v)\n\t\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_ENTITY_ID_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\t\tmatch = matchesString(c, entityId)\n\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\treturn false, reason, errs.ErrInvalid(\"unknown constraint type\")\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\te.logger.Debug(\"error matching constraint\", zap.String(\"property\", c.Property), zap.Error(err))\n\t\t\t// don't return here because we want to continue to evaluate the other constraints\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif match {\n\t\t\t// increase the matchCount\n\t\t\tconstraintMatches++\n\n\t\t\tswitch segmentMatchType {\n\t\t\tcase flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE:\n\t\t\t\t// can short circuit here since we had at least one match\n\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\t\t// keep looping as we need to match all constraints\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t// no match\n\t\t\tswitch segmentMatchType {\n\t\t\tcase flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE:\n\t\t\t\t// we can short circuit because we must match all constraints\n\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\t\t// keep looping to see if we match the next constraint\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tvar matched = true\n\n\tswitch segmentMatchType {\n\tcase flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE:\n\t\tif len(constraints) != constraintMatches {\n\t\t\treason = \"did not match ALL constraints\"\n\t\t\tmatched = false\n\t\t}\n\n\tcase flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE:\n\t\tif len(constraints) > 0 && constraintMatches == 0 {\n\t\t\treason = \"did not match ANY constraints\"\n\t\t\tmatched = false\n\t\t}\n\tdefault:\n\t\treason = fmt.Sprintf(\"unknown match type %d\", segmentMatchType)\n\t\tmatched = false\n\t}\n\n\treturn matched, reason, nil\n}\n\nfunc crc32Num(entityID string, salt string) uint {\n\treturn uint(crc32.ChecksumIEEE([]byte(salt+entityID))) % totalBucketNum\n}\n\nconst (\n\t// totalBucketNum represents how many buckets we can use to determine the consistent hashing\n\t// distribution and rollout\n\ttotalBucketNum uint = 1000\n\n\t// percentMultiplier implies that the multiplier between percentage (100) and totalBucketNum\n\tpercentMultiplier float32 = float32(totalBucketNum) / 100\n)\n\nfunc matchesString(c storage.EvaluationConstraint, v string) bool {\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpEmpty:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) == 0\n\tcase flipt.OpNotEmpty:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) != 0\n\t}\n\n\tif v == \"\" {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\tvalue := c.Value\n\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpEQ:\n\t\treturn value == v\n\tcase flipt.OpNEQ:\n\t\treturn value != v\n\tcase flipt.OpPrefix:\n\t\treturn strings.HasPrefix(strings.TrimSpace(v), value)\n\tcase flipt.OpSuffix:\n\t\treturn strings.HasSuffix(strings.TrimSpace(v), value)\n\tcase flipt.OpIsOneOf:\n\t\tvalues := []string{}\n\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(value), &values); err exhausted all rollouts and we still don't have a match, return flag enabled value.\n\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_DEFAULT_EVALUATION_REASON\n\tresp.Enabled =
